spell.atelier.firebolt.desc: Launches a small fireball in the direction you are looking. Stronger casts move faster and hit harder.
spell.atelier.gust.desc: A burst of wind knocks back all nearby entities. Greater power increases both range and knockback force.
spell.atelier.healing_spring.desc: Channels water's life force to restore your health immediately. At higher power, also grants Regeneration for several seconds.
spell.atelier.stone_barrier.desc: Raises stone blocks in front of you to form a wall. Greater power makes the wall taller and wider.
spell.atelier.flash.desc: A blinding flash afflicts nearby monsters with Blindness. At greater power, they also glow, revealing their positions through walls.
